ast.name: description
ast.source: Turning on will include the folder path in the connections results.
ast.target: 开启后，将在连接结果中包含文件夹路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adjust the number of connections displayed in the connections view (default 20).
ast.target: 调整连接视图中显示的连接数量（默认为 20）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclude notes that already link to the current note from the connections results.
ast.target: 从连接结果中排除已链接到当前笔记的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclude notes that are already linked from within the current note from appearing in the connections results.
ast.target: 从连接结果中排除已从当前笔记内部链接的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be included in the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: 笔记必须在其文件/文件夹路径中匹配此值。匹配的笔记将包含在连接结果中。多个值请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must *not* match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be *excluded* from the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: 笔记必须*不*在其文件/文件夹路径中匹配此值。匹配的笔记将被*排除*在连接结果之外。多个值请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show only sources in the connections results (no blocks).
ast.target: 在连接结果中仅显示来源（无块）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select a model platform to use with Smart Model.
ast.target: 选择要与智能模型一起使用的模型平台。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 本地，512 令牌，384 维（推荐）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 本地，8,192 词元，768 维度，中英双语

ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "warning" level events.
ast.target: 为“警告”级别事件显示 Obsidian 原生通知。

ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "error" level events.
ast.target: 为“错误”级别事件显示 Obsidian 原生通知。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show Obsidian native notices for "attention" level events.

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
ast.source: A friendly name for this model configuration.
ast.target: 此模型配置的友好名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The model to use from the selected provider.
ast.target: 从所选提供商中使用的模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose whether results should be sources or blocks.
ast.target: 选择结果应为来源还是块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Blocks represent parts/sections of notes. Get more granular results.
ast.target: 块代表笔记的部分/章节。获取更精细的结果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Time in seconds to wait before re-importing a file after modification. Increase if re-importing is interfering with editing experience. Decrease to have changes reflected in the Smart Environment more quickly.
ast.target: 修改后重新导入文件前等待的时间（秒）。如果重新导入干扰编辑体验，请增加此值。减少此值可使更改更快地反映在智能环境中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manage the list of folders excluded from processing.
ast.target: 管理排除在处理之外的文件夹列表。

ast.target: 清除来源数据并重新导入。
